data.title: validate-config.sh: preplanning.interactive not registered in KNOWN_KEYS
data.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: The preplanning.interactive config key is not registered in plugins/dso/scripts/validate-config.sh KNOWN_KEYS. This is consistent with ~20 other pre-existing unregistered keys (worktree.isolation_enabled, monitoring.tool_errors, model.haiku, etc.), so validate-config.sh already exits with errors for this repo. When task d481-3e6c (config key registration) was closed, the KNOWN_KEYS update may not have been completed.
File: .claude/dso-config.conf
Category: maintainability
